Middle Seat.name: 中间座位 Middle Seat
Middle Seat.description:
一名小型生物可以坐进一辆已有3名乘客的城市巡航车后座。

A Small creature can fit in the backseat of an urban cruiser that already has 3 passengers.

Phantom Communication.name: 幽灵通信 Phantom Communication

Threatening Message.name: 威胁讯息 Threatening Message
Threatening Message.description:
触发条件 一个位于该闹 haunted 区域内且携带通讯装置的生物进入该区域

效果 该闹 haunted 通过触发用的通讯装置发出威胁之语，对通讯装置20尺内的生物造成 @Damage[(1d6+4)[mental]] 伤害（@Check[will|dc:19|basic] 豁免）。若豁免失败，该生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

Trigger A creature with a comm unit enters the haunt's area

Effect The haunt utters threats through the triggering comm unit, dealing @Damage[(1d6+4)[mental]] damage to creatures within 20 feet of the comm unit (@Check[will|dc:19|basic] save). On a failure, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Phantom Communication.disable:
@Check[religion|dc:15] （受训）以驱逐这些灵体，或 @Check[performance|dc:18] 以压过这些灵体的声音，或 @Check[computers|dc:16] （受训）以驱散幽灵般的信标

@Check[religion|dc:15] (trained) to banish the spirits, or @Check[performance|dc:18] to drown out the spirits' voices, or @Check[computers|dc:16] (trained) to disperse the ghostly signal
Phantom Communication.hazarddescription:
愤怒的灵体通过附近的通讯器发出萦绕不去的威胁与谴责。

Angry spirits utter haunting threats and condemnations through a nearby comm unit.
Phantom Communication.stealthdetails:
（受训）以察觉奇怪的静电

(trained) to notice strange static

Monument to the Devourer.name: 吞噬者纪念碑 Monument to the Devourer
Monument to the Devourer.tokenName: 吞噬者纪念碑 Monument to the Devourer

Surge of Trapped Souls.name: 受困灵魂奔涌 Surge of Trapped Souls
Surge of Trapped Souls.description:
触发条件 一个活着的生物移动到纪念碑15英尺内

效果 所有被这座纪念碑杀死者的灵魂向外奔涌，对纪念碑60英尺内所有活着的生物造成 @Damage[(4d10+22)[void]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic] 豁免）。被此灵异现象杀死的生物，其灵魂会被困在纪念碑中，直到纪念碑被摧毁。

Trigger A living creature moves within 15 feet of the monument

Effect The souls of all those killed by this monument surge outward, dealing @Damage[(4d10+22)[void]] damage to all living creatures within 60 feet of the monument (@Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic] save). Creatures killed by this haunt have their soul trapped in the monument until the monument is destroyed.

Monument to the Devourer.disable:
@Check[deception|dc:33]（大师）以伪装成信徒并命令这座纪念碑静止，或 @Check[religion|dc:30]（专家）向诸神祈祷以求保护，或 @Check[occultism|dc:30]（专家）安抚被困的灵魂；需要两次成功才能将其禁用

@Check[deception|dc:33] (master) to pose as a believer and command the monument to still, or @Check[religion|dc:30] (expert) to pray to the gods for protection, or @Check[occultism|dc:30] (expert) to soothe the trapped spirits; two successes are required to disable it
Monument to the Devourer.hazarddescription:
这座神龛长期以来一直被用作举行献祭仪式和邪恶魔法的祭坛。当非信徒接近这座纪念碑时，所有在此被杀者的灵魂便会汹涌而出，收割他们的生命。

This shrine has long served as an altar for sacrificial rites and foul magic. When non-believers approach the monument, the souls of all those killed here surge out to reap their lives.

Cruising Drop.name: 巡航下降 Cruising Drop
Cruising Drop.description:
使用涡轮滑翔机的风力推进的唯一方式，是从陡坡上一跃而下，或者在你已经处于空中时。未受控且使用风力推进的涡轮滑翔机会在每轮下落60英尺，直到驾驶员成功地【接管操控】。涡轮滑翔机必须处于受控状态才能切换推进方式。如果滑翔机在驾驶员成功地【接管操控】之前撞击地面，驾驶员和滑翔机各自都会受到坠落伤害。

The only way to use the wind propulsion of a turboglider is to jump off a steep incline or if you're already in the air. An uncontrolled turboglider using wind propulsion falls 60 feet each round until the pilot successfully Takes Control. A turboglider must be controlled to switch propulsion. If the glider hits the ground before the pilot successfully Takes Control, the pilot and the glider each take falling damage.

Electric Fence.name: 电网围栏 Electric Fence

Buy! Buy! Buy!.name: 买！买！买！ Buy! Buy! Buy!
Buy! Buy! Buy!.description:
触发条件 一个生物直接或使用工具触碰栅栏

效果 陷阱对触发它的生物造成 @Damage[1d10[electricity]] 伤害。若陷阱尚未掷先攻，则其掷先攻。

Trigger A creature touches the fence directly or with a tool

Effect The trap deals @Damage[1d10[electricity]] damage to the triggering creature. The trap rolls initiative if it hasn't already.

Electric Fence.disable:
@Check[crafting|dc:17]（受训）以将围栏中 10 英尺长的一段接地，或 @Check[thievery|dc:18]（受训）以切断围栏的电力

@Check[crafting|dc:17] (trained) to ground a 10-foot portion of the fence, or @Check[thievery|dc:18] (trained) to cut power to the fence
Electric Fence.hazarddescription:
一圈15英尺高的通电围栏会电击任何触碰到它的人。

A 15-foot-tall electrified fence electrocutes anyone who touches it.
Electric Fence.routine:
（1 个动作）陷阱会对每个直接接触围栏或用工具接触围栏的生物施加电击，造成 @Damage[1d10[electricity]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:23|basic] 豁免）。

(1 action) The trap electrocutes each creature touching the fence directly or with a tool, dealing @Damage[1d10[electricity]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:23|basic] save).

Mutation Fog.name: 变异雾 Mutation Fog

Harmful Mutation.name: 有害突变 Harmful Mutation
Harmful Mutation.description:
触发条件 一个生物在迷雾中开始其回合

效果 迷雾中涌动着能量，在有害地使其中所有生物的身体发生突变的同时，对迷雾中的所有生物造成 @Damage[(6d10+27)[bludgeoning]] 伤害。区域内的生物必须尝试进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:32] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。它抵抗了突变。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害。其血肉会覆盖上一层散发恶臭的水疱，持续 1 小时。只要它具有这一突变，它便处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}，且无法降低其恶心状态的值。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害。其四肢会痛苦地扭曲，持续 [[/gmr 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 小时}。只要它具有这一突变，它便处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}，且无法降低其恶心状态的值。

Trigger A creature begins its turn in the fog

Effect The fog surges with energy, dealing @Damage[(6d10+27)[bludgeoning]] damage to all creatures in the fog as it harmfully mutates their bodies. Creatures in the area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:32] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage. It resists mutation.

Failure The creature takes full damage. Its flesh becomes coated in foul-smelling blisters for 1 hour. For as long as it has this mutation, it is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} and can't reduce the value of its sickened condition.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage. Its limbs become painfully twisted for [[/gmr 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours}. For as long as it has this mutation, it is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} and can't reduce the value of its sickened condition.

Mutation Fog.disable:
@Check[nature|dc:35]（大师）以中和迷雾，或 @Check[survival|dc:35]（大师）以驱散迷雾

@Check[nature|dc:35] (master) to neutralize the fog, or @Check[survival|dc:35] (master) to disperse the fog
Mutation Fog.hazarddescription:
一团充满变化系烟雾的迷雾充满了半径30英尺的区域，使进入其中的生物发生痛苦的变异。

A fog of transmutative fumes fills a 30-foot radius area, painfully mutating creatures who enter.

Memory Crystals.name: 记忆水晶 Memory Crystals

Leech Memories.name: 汲取记忆 Leech Memories
Leech Memories.description:
触发条件 一个非无心智生物进入记忆水晶 5 尺内

效果 记忆水晶扩张到其空间相邻的每一个方格中。随着它们生长，它们会吸收周围环境中的记忆与游离思绪，在扩张后对 10 尺内的生物造成 @Damage[8d10[mental]] 伤害（@Check[will|dc:42|basic] 豁免）。

Trigger A non-mindless creature comes within 5 feet of the memory crystals

Effect The memory crystals expand into every square adjacent to their space. As they grow, they absorb memories and ambient thought from their surroundings, dealing @Damage[8d10[mental]] damage (@Check[will|dc:42|basic] save) to creatures within 10 feet after they expand.

Memory Field.name: 记忆场域 Memory Field
Memory Field.description:
灵光 5ft

记忆水晶对附近的生物造成 @Damage[8d10[mental]] 伤害。

Aura 5ft

Memory crystals deal @Damage[8d10[mental]] damage to nearby creatures.

Memory Crystals.disable:
@Check[arcana|dc:48]（传奇）以建立心灵防护，或 @Check[occultism|dc:48]（传奇）以将表层思绪无害地输送给水晶，或 @Check[religion|dc:51]（传奇）以祈求免受水晶侵害的保护

@Check[arcana|dc:48] (legendary) to erect mental wards, or @Check[occultism|dc:48] (legendary) to harmlessly feed surface thoughts to the crystals, or @Check[religion|dc:51] (legendary) to pray for protection from the crystals
Memory Crystals.hazarddescription:
发光的黄色水晶在其晶面中折射出被窃取记忆的模糊印痕。

Glowing yellow crystals refract the blurred imprints of stolen memories within their facets.
Memory Crystals.reset:
展开后，记忆水晶在 1 天内无法再次生长。

After expanding, the memory crystals can't grow again for 1 day.

Laser Web.name: 激光网 Laser Web
激光网 Laser Web
Laser Web.description:
触发条件 一个生物移动到某个传感器 5 尺范围内

效果 激光发射，每一道都会对走廊中的一个生物进行打击。若生物数量多于激光数量，激光会优先以触发该装置的生物为目标；若生物数量少于激光数量，激光会优先对触发该装置的生物进行多次打击。

Trigger A creature moves within 5 feet of a sensor

Effect The lasers fire, each one Striking a creature in the hallway. If there are more creatures than lasers, the lasers prioritize the triggering creature or creatures; if there are fewer creatures than lasers, the lasers prioritize Striking the triggering creature or creatures multiple times.

Laser.name: 激光 Laser
Laser.description:
没有多重攻击减值

No multiple attack penalty

Laser Web.disable:
@Check[computers|dc:15] （受训）或盗窃（受训）以禁用每个传感器，或 @Check[acrobatics|dc:23] （专家）以从每个传感器旁滑过

@Check[computers|dc:15] (trained) or Thievery (trained) to disable each sensor, or @Check[acrobatics|dc:23] (expert) to slip past each sensor
Laser Web.hazarddescription:
隐藏在一条 15 英尺长走廊中的六个传感器在侦测到移动时会发射激光。

Six sensors concealed in a 15-foot-long corridor fire lasers when they detect movement.
Laser Web.reset:
该陷阱会在15分钟后重置。

The trap resets after 15 minutes.

Haywire Robotic Arm.name: 失控机械臂 Haywire Robotic Arm
Haywire Robotic Arm.tokenName: 故障机械臂 Haywire Robotic Arm

Manufacture.name: 制造 Manufacture
Manufacture.description:
触发条件 一个生物移动到机械臂的触及范围内

效果 陷阱对触发的生物进行一次手臂打击，随后进行擒抱（+17 Athletics）。被陷阱@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}的生物会受到@Damage[1d6[persistent,bludgeoning]]伤害，直到其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱}（DC 27），或者陷阱被停用或摧毁。

Trigger A creature moves within reach of the robotic arm

Effect The trap makes an arm Strike against the triggering creature, then Grabs (+17 Athletics). A creature @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by the trap takes @Damage[1d6[persistent,bludgeoning]] damage until they @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} (DC 27) or the trap is deactivated or destroyed.

Haywire Robotic Arm.disable:
@Check[computers|dc:20]（受训）以调试故障机械臂，或 @Check[crafting|dc:25]（受训）使机械臂的关节卡死，或 @Check[thievery|dc:23]（受训）停用机械臂

@Check[computers|dc:20] (trained) to debug the malfunctioning arm, or @Check[crafting|dc:25] (trained) to cause the arm's joints to seize, or @Check[thievery|dc:23] (trained) to disable the arm
Haywire Robotic Arm.hazarddescription:
一条机械制造臂发生故障，攻击附近的生物。

A robotic manufacturing arm malfunctions, attacking nearby creatures.

Hacker's Folly.name: 黑客的愚行 Hacker's Folly

Hacker's Fixation.name: 黑客的执着 Hacker's Fixation
Hacker's Fixation.description:
触发条件一个生物直接或使用工具触碰控制台

效果闹鬼现象会用色彩斑斓的图像和有趣的数据分散使用者的注意力，同时削弱其精神防御。触发该陷阱的生物必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:22] 豁免检定。随后该陷阱掷先攻。

大成功该生物不受影响。

成功该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续1轮。

失败该生物陷入迟钝 1。

大失败该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}。此外，它还会对这台电脑陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}，且除被动查看电脑上的数据外不能采取任何行动。在其每个回合结束时，它都可以重新进行这次豁免检定，以移除着迷状态。

Trigger A creature touches the console directly or with a tool

Effect The haunt distracts the user with colorful graphics and interesting data while lowering their mental defenses. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:22] save. The trap then rolls initiative.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is stupefied 1.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}. Additionally, they are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} with the computer and can't take any actions except to passively view the data on the computer. At the end of each of their turns, they can retry this saving throw to remove the fascinated condition.

Hacker's Folly.disable:
@Check[computers|dc:16]（受训）以分割闹鬼的代码，或 @Check[religion|dc:18]（受训）或神秘学（受训）以驱除灵体

@Check[computers|dc:16] (trained) to partition the haunted code, or @Check[religion|dc:18] (trained) or Occultism (trained) to exorcise the spirit
Hacker's Folly.hazarddescription:
一个幽灵黑客萦绕在他们的计算机中，并试图汲取任何访问过这台计算机之人的灵魂。

A ghostly hacker haunts their computer and attempts to drain the spirit of anyone who accessed the computer.
Hacker's Folly.reset:
该陷阱会在 1 小时后重置。

The trap resets after 1 hour.
Hacker's Folly.routine:
(1 动作) 该怨灵会吸收生者的灵魂，对计算机 10 尺内的所有活着的生物造成 @Damage[(1d10+4)[spirit]] 伤害（@Check[will|dc:18|basic] 豁免）。若重度失败，生物还会额外陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}。为结束 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} 状态之目的，此例行程序不算作敌对动作。

(1 action) The haunt absorbs the spirits of the living, dealing @Damage[(1d10+4)[spirit]] damage to all living creatures within 10 feet of the computer (@Check[will|dc:18|basic] save). On a critical failure, a creature is additionally @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}. This routine doesn't count as a hostile action for the purposes of ending the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} condition.

Trash Compactor.name: 垃圾压缩机 Trash Compactor

Commence Crushing.name: 开始碾压 Commence Crushing
Commence Crushing.description:
触发条件 两个或更多生物在房间内结束其回合

效果 门猛然关闭，将房间封死。随后该陷阱掷先攻。

Trigger Two or more creatures end their turn in the room

Effect The doors slam shut, sealing the room. The trap then rolls initiative.

Trash Compactor.disable:
@Check[crafting|dc:26]（专家）以卡住碾压机构，或 @Check[thievery|dc:24]（专家）以停用陷阱；@Check[athletics|dc:28]（受训）以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{强行打开} 门（这不会停用陷阱）

@Check[crafting|dc:26] (expert) to jam the crushing mechanism, or @Check[thievery|dc:24] (expert) to deactivate the trap; @Check[athletics|dc:28] (trained) to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force Open} the door (this doesn't disable the trap)
Trash Compactor.hazarddescription:
启动后，自动垃圾压缩机会缓慢地压碎其中的一切。

When activated, the automated trash compactor slowly crushes everything inside it.
Trash Compactor.reset:
该陷阱会在 1 分钟后停用并重置。

The trap deactivates and resets after 1 minute.
Trash Compactor.routine:
（1 动作）房间的两面墙向房间中心移动 5 英尺，自动将这些空间内的所有生物推向更靠近房间中心 5 英尺，并对房间内的所有生物造成 @Damage[(2d8+9)[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:24|basic] 豁免）。因该伤害死亡的生物会被碾成细糊。

(1 action) Two of the room's walls move 5 feet toward the center of the room, automatically pushing any creatures in those spaces 5 feet closer to the room's center and dealing @Damage[(2d8+9)[bludgeoning]] damage to all creatures in the room (@Check[fortitude|dc:24|basic] save). Creatures that die from this damage are crushed to a fine paste.

Harness the Storm.name: 驾驭风暴 Harness the Storm
Harness the Storm.description:
需求 天空船处于暴雨之中

效果 天空船通过其魔法帆汲取风暴的电能，随后将这股能量以一道闪电的形式释放出去，从天空船前方迸发而出。闪电对 @Template[type:line|distance:60] 内的每个生物造成 @Damage[2d8[electricity]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] 豁免）。如果天空船损坏，“驾驭风暴”便会停止运作。

Requirements The skyboat is in a rainstorm

Effect The skyboat harnesses the storm's electrical energy through its magical sails, then expels this energy as a bolt of lightning that erupts from the front of the skyboat. The lightning deals @Damage[2d8[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature in a @Template[type:line|distance:60] (@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] save). Harness the Storm stops working if the skyboat is broken.

Laser Turret.name: 激光炮塔 Laser Turret

Laser Blast.name: 激光爆破 Laser Blast
Laser Blast.description:
触发条件 一个生物移动到炮塔30英尺内

效果 陷阱对该生物进行一次激光打击；陷阱掷先攻。

Trigger A creature moves within 30 feet of the turret

Effect The trap makes a laser Strike against the creature; the trap rolls initiative.

Laser Turret.disable:
@Check[computers|dc:18]（受训）以重新编程炮塔，或 @Check[crafting|dc:17]（受训）以切断炮塔电源，或 @Check[thievery|dc:16]（受训）以禁用炮塔

@Check[computers|dc:18] (trained) to reprogram the turret, or @Check[crafting|dc:17] (trained) to cut power to the turret, or @Check[thievery|dc:16] (trained) to disable the turret
Laser Turret.hazarddescription:
当入侵者进入安全区域时，一座隐藏式炮塔会升起并发射激光。

A concealed turret pops up and fires a laser when intruders enter a secure area.
Laser Turret.reset:
该陷阱会在 1 分钟后重置。

The trap resets after 1 minute.
Laser Turret.routine:
（3 个动作）该陷阱对射程内至多三个生物进行一次激光打击；如果没有额外目标，则可对射程内一个生物进行多次打击。

(3 actions) The trap makes a laser Strike against up to three creatures in range, or multiple Strikes against one creature in range if it has no additional targets.

Sea-to-Sky Transference.name: 海天传导 Sea-to-Sky Transference
Sea-to-Sky Transference.description:
驾驶员启动传递模式，使掠波艇能从一片水域（或其他流体）中自行发射进入轨道，或从太空坠入海中，速度为每轮1,500英尺。

The pilot engages transference mode, causing the wakeskimmer to launch itself from a body of water (or other fluid) up into orbit or to plummet from space into the sea, at a Speed of 1,500 feet per round.

Space Vehicle.name: 太空载具 Space Vehicle
Space Vehicle.description:
这辆载具可保护其使用者免受太空中的危险，包括 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.FLODmOj4yK7eJn0a]{基础环境防护} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.0kD0MZgiK0SYS6e6]{商用过滤式呼吸器} 所提供的益处。

This vehicle protects its users from the dangers of space, including the benefits of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.FLODmOj4yK7eJn0a]{Basic Environmental Protection} and a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.0kD0MZgiK0SYS6e6]{Commercial Filtered Rebreather}.

Explosive Overload.name: 爆炸性过载 Explosive Overload

Explode.name: 爆炸 Explode
Explode.description:
触发条件 一个生物移动到该装置 30 英尺内

效果 陷阱发出巨大的声响。在下一轮结束时，该装置爆炸，对该装置 15 英尺内的所有生物造成 @Damage[(2d6+5)[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] 豁免）。此次爆炸会摧毁该装置。

Trigger A creature moves within 30 feet of the device

Effect The trap makes a loud noise. At the end of the next round, the device explodes, dealing @Damage[(2d6+5)[piercing]] damage to all creatures within 15 feet of the device (@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] save). This explosion destroys the device.

Explosive Overload.disable:
@Check[crafting|dc:19]（受训）可安全关闭该装置，或 @Check[thievery|dc:21]（受训）可快速排放该装置

@Check[crafting|dc:19] (trained) to safely shut down the device, or @Check[thievery|dc:21] (trained) to quickly vent the device
Explosive Overload.hazarddescription:
一台发电机、引擎或其他大型固定装置发生过载，距灾难性爆炸仅剩片刻。

A generator, engine, or other large immobile device overloads and is moments from catastrophically exploding.

Cryo Mist.name: 寒霜迷雾 Cryo Mist

Freeze!.name: 站住！ Freeze!
Freeze!.description:
触发条件 一个生物移动到喷嘴下方

效果 陷阱向触发该陷阱的生物喷射冷空气，造成 @Damage[(4d10+26)[cold]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:33] 豁免）。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}，持续 [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 轮}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，陷入笨拙 2，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}，持续 1 分钟。触发该陷阱的生物周围 10 尺内的生物受到 @Damage[(2d12+13)[cold]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:29|basic] 豁免）。

Trigger A creature moves below the nozzles

Effect The trap sprays cold air on the triggering creature, dealing @Damage[(4d10+26)[cold]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:33] save).

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}.

Failure The creature takes full damage, becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} or [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, becomes clumsy 2, and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 minute. Creatures within 10 feet of the triggering creature take @Damage[(2d12+13)[cold]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:29|basic] save).

Cryo Mist.disable:
@Check[computers|dc:27]（大师）将空气温度提高到安全水平，或 @Check[thievery|dc:27]（大师）停用喷嘴

@Check[computers|dc:27] (master) to increase the air's temperature to safe levels, or @Check[thievery|dc:27] (master) to deactivate the nozzles
Cryo Mist.hazarddescription:
天花板中的隐藏喷嘴会释放超低温空气，可能将入侵者冻在原地。

Hidden nozzles in the ceiling release hyper-cold air, potentially freezing intruders in place.
Cryo Mist.reset:
该陷阱会在 1 分钟后重置。

The trap resets after 1 minute.

Hover.name: 悬浮 Hover
Hover.description:
悬浮滑板会保持在其他表面上方 6 英寸的高度，例如地面或水面。如果从高处驶离，悬浮滑板每轮会下降 20 英尺高度，并在着陆时不会对悬浮滑板或其驾驶者造成伤害。

A hoverboard maintains an altitude of 6 inches above other surfaces, such as the ground or water. If driven off a high surface, the hoverboard loses 20 feet of altitude per round, landing without harm to the hoverboard or its pilot.

Portable.name: 便携 Portable
Portable.description:
悬浮滑板可作为一件1体积的物品携带。

The hoverboard can be carried as an item with 1 Bulk.

Repulsing Force Field.name: 斥力力场 Repulsing Force Field
Repulsing Force Field.tokenName: 斥力力场 Repulsing Force Field

Forbid Entry.name: 禁止入内 Forbid Entry
Forbid Entry.description:
触发条件 一个生物试图通过指定区域

效果 力场出现并将该生物弹开，且对触发该反应的生物进行一次打击。

Trigger A creature attempts to pass the designated area

Effect The force field appears and shunts the creature away, making a Strike against the triggering creature.

Force Field.name: 力场 Force Field
Force Field.description:
此外，目标会被击退 10 尺（若为重击则击退 20 尺）。如果触发该效果的生物进行了调整步，或因强制移动效果而移动，则力场的命中检定承受 –2 的情境减值。

plus the target is knocked back 10 feet (20 feet on a critical hit). The force field takes a –2 circumstance penalty to hit if the triggering creature Stepped or was moved by a forced movement effect.

Repulsing Force Field.disable:
@Check[thievery|dc:33]（专家）以解除力场，或使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}（6环；反制 DC 29）来反制力场

@Check[thievery|dc:33] (expert) to disable the force field, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (6th rank; counteract DC 29) to counteract the force field
Repulsing Force Field.hazarddescription:
一道半透明的力场出现，阻挡一个生物的路径，并将其以及任何试图穿过它的其他生物弹开。

A translucent force field appears to block a creature's path, shunting it and any other creature that attempts to pass it away.
Repulsing Force Field.reset:
力场会解除，陷阱会在 1 分钟后重置。

The force field deactivates and the trap resets after 1 minute.

Psychotropic Spores.name: 精神作用孢子 Psychotropic Spores

Release Spores.name: 释放孢子 Release Spores
Release Spores.description:
触发条件 一个生物接触或伤害了真菌

效果 真菌在一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内释放出致幻孢子。区域内所有生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:21] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} 1轮，并受到 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} 10分钟（若为严重失败，则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}）。

Trigger A creatures touches or damages the fungus

Effect The fungus releases psychotropic spores in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. All creatures in the area must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:21] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 10 minutes (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} on a critical failure).

Psychotropic Spores.disable:
@Check[nature|dc:20]（受训）使真菌进入休眠状态，或 @Check[survival|dc:22]（受训）安全地移除真菌

@Check[nature|dc:20] (trained) to force the fungus into a dormant state, or @Check[survival|dc:22] (trained) to safely remove the fungus
Psychotropic Spores.hazarddescription:
当有生物靠近时，一种色彩斑斓的真菌会释放致幻孢子。

A colorful fungus releases psychotropic spores when a creature comes near.
Psychotropic Spores.reset:
休眠的真菌会在1小时内重新活化；被摧毁的真菌会在2周内重新生长。

Dormant fungus reactivates in 1 hour; destroyed fungus regrows over the course of 2 weeks.

Temporal Rift.name: 时间裂隙 Temporal Rift

Time Shudder.name: 时间战栗 Time Shudder
Time Shudder.description:
触发 一个生物移动到裂隙 10 尺范围内

效果 触发该效果的生物因其身体迅速衰老而受到 6d10+20 伤害。它必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:33] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，变为笨拙 2 和虚弱 2，并陷入迟缓，持续 1 分钟。

Trigger A creature moves within 10 feet of the rift

Effect The triggering creature takes 6d10+20 damage as its body rapidly ages. It must attempt a @Check[will|dc:33] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}.

Failure The creature takes full damage, and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, becomes clumsy 2 and enfeebled 2, and becomes slowed for 1 minute.

Temporal Rift.disable:
@Check[arcana|dc:36]（大师）或 Occultism（大师）以通过魔法修复时间，@Check[thievery|dc:40]（大师）以修复时间裂隙，或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}（第7环；抵消 DC 31）以抵消该裂隙

@Check[arcana|dc:36] (master) or Occultism (master) to magically mend time, @Check[thievery|dc:40] (master) to repair the time rift, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (7th rank; counteract DC 31) to counteract the rift
Temporal Rift.hazarddescription:
一道时间裂隙会迅速使任何靠近的人衰老并减速。

A rift in time rapidly ages and slows anyone who draws near.

Jolting Console.name: 电击控制台 Jolting Console

Jolt.name: 震击 Jolt
Jolt.description:
触发 一个生物直接或使用工具抓住控制台

效果 该陷阱对触发该陷阱的生物以及该生物5英尺内的生物造成 @Damage[5d8[electricity]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] 豁免）。

Trigger A creature grasps the console directly or with a tool

Effect The trap deals @Damage[5d8[electricity]] damage to the triggering creature and creatures within 5 feet of the triggering creature (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save).

Jolting Console.disable:
@Check[computers|dc:16]（受训）以禁用控制台的程序设定，或 @Check[crafting|dc:17]（受训）以重新布设电击栅格线路，或 @Check[thievery|dc:18]（受训）以停用电击栅格

@Check[computers|dc:16] (trained) to disable the console's programming, or @Check[crafting|dc:17] (trained) to rewire the shock grid, or @Check[thievery|dc:18] (trained) to deactivate the shock grid
Jolting Console.hazarddescription:
嵌入计算机控制台或门板中的电击网格会释放出强力电流。

A shock grid built into a computer console or door panel releases a powerful electric charge.

Reality Geyser.name: 现实喷泉 Reality Geyser

Tear Reality.name: 撕裂现实 Tear Reality
Tear Reality.description:
触发条件 一个生物移动到休眠的眼泪圣物30英尺内

效果 现实中裂开一道裂隙，在地面上凿出一个半径5英尺的坑洞。该陷阱掷先攻。

Trigger A creature moves within 30 feet of the dormant tear

Effect A tear opens in reality, gouging a 5-foot radius hole in the earth. The trap rolls initiative.

Reality Geyser.disable:
@Check[arcana|dc:27]（专家）以消散魔法能量，或 @Check[nature|dc:25]（专家）以封闭裂口，或 @Check[survival|dc:30]（受训）以哄劝大地重新合拢

@Check[arcana|dc:27] (expert) to diffuse the magical energy, or @Check[nature|dc:25] (expert) to seal the tear, or @Check[survival|dc:30] (trained) to coax the earth back together
Reality Geyser.hazarddescription:
现实中的一道裂隙如间歇泉般向空气中喷涌出混乱翻腾的能量，将毁灭倾泻到一片区域之上。

A tear in reality emits a chaotic churn of energy into the air like a geyser, raining destruction down on an area.
Reality Geyser.routine:
(2 actions) 一股混沌翻涌的能量从眼泪圣物中爆发，对以眼泪圣物为中心、30英尺高的圆柱区域内所有生物造成 @Damage[(2d10+5)[acid]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] 豁免）。受到该能量伤害的生物还会被额外向空中推起 10 英尺（重度失败则为 20 英尺）。随后，这股逸散的能量如雨般落下，对眼泪圣物 60 英尺内的所有生物造成 @Damage[1d10[fire]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:23|basic] 豁免）。

(2 actions) A chaotic churn of energy blasts out of the tear, dealing @Damage[(2d10+5)[acid]] damage to all creatures in a 30-foot-tall cylinder centered on the tear (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save). Creatures damaged by this energy are additionally pushed 10 feet into the air (20 feet on a critical failure). This dispersed energy then rains down, dealing @Damage[1d10[fire]] damage to all creatures within 60 feet of the tear (@Check[fortitude|dc:23|basic] save).

Deadly Vidgame.name: 致命电子游戏 Deadly Vidgame
Deadly Vidgame.tokenName: 致命电子游戏 Deadly Vidgame

New Game.name: 新游戏 New Game
New Game.description:
触发条件 一个生物开始玩这个电子游戏

效果 该陷阱尝试将所有玩家拖入电子游戏中。每名玩家都必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:25] 豁免。然后该陷阱掷先攻。

大成功 该生物不受影响，并且可以在现实的安全环境中玩这个游戏。

成功 该生物被拖入游戏中 1 轮，随后立即逃离游戏，返回现实。

失败 该生物被拖入游戏中，并且在该陷阱被解除之前无法逃离游戏。

大失败 该生物被拖入游戏中，并且在该陷阱被解除之前无法逃离游戏。不幸的是，它是在困难模式下进行游戏，并且它将该陷阱例行程序的 DC 视为高出 2。

Trigger A creature begins to play the vidgame

Effect The trap attempts to pull all players into the vidgame. Each player must attempt a @Check[will|dc:25] save. The trap then rolls initiative.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and can play the game from the safety of reality.

Success The creature is pulled into the game for 1 round, then immediately escapes the game, returning to reality.

Failure The creature is pulled into the game and can't escape the game until the trap is disabled.

Critical Failure The creature is pulled into the game and can't escape the game until the trap is disabled. Unfortunately, it's playing on hard mode, and it treats the DC of the trap's routine as 2 higher.

Auto-Save.name: 自动保存 Auto-Save
Auto-Save.description:
如果 vidgame 主机被关闭，vidgame 内的所有生物都会留在 vidgame 中，并暂时从现实中移除。如果 vidgame 主机重新开启，这些生物会从中断处继续游戏。

If the vidgame console is turned off, all creatures inside the vidgame remain inside the vidgame and are temporarily removed from reality. If the vidgame console is turned back on, these creatures continue the game where they left off.

Deadly Vidgame.disable:
@Check[计算机|dc:22]（受训）以重新编程该游戏，或 @Check[thievery|dc:22]（受训）以利用漏洞，或 @Check[Vidgame Lore|dc:17]（受训）以通关该游戏；总共需要四次成功才能解除该陷阱

@Check[computers|dc:22] (trained) to reprogram the game, or @Check[thievery|dc:22] (trained) to exploit a glitch, or @Check[Vidgame Lore|dc:17] (trained) to beat the game; four total successes are required to disable the trap
Deadly Vidgame.hazarddescription:
一款超写实的电子游戏将玩家拉入一个虚拟世界，把他们变成像素化的化身，并让他们面对致命的挑战。

A hyperrealistic vidgame pulls players into a virtual world, transforming them into pixelated avatars and pitting them against deadly challenges.
Deadly Vidgame.reset:
这个陷阱会在 1 小时后重置。

The trap resets after 1 hour.
Deadly Vidgame.routine:
（1个动作）这个陷阱以1个动作向游戏中的玩家提出致命挑战。游戏内的每个生物受到 @Damage[(2d8+5)[slashing]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] 豁免）。若愿意，生物可以尝试一次Vidgame学识检定来替代其豁免检定。

(1 action) The trap presents the game's players with deadly challenges as 1 action. Each creature inside the game takes @Damage[(2d8+5)[slashing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] save). A creature can attempt a Vidgame Lore check in place of their saving throw, if desired.

Sentry Turret.name: 哨戒炮塔 Sentry Turret

Open Fire.name: 开火 Open Fire
Open Fire.description:
触发条件 一个生物移动到炮塔30英尺内，或攻击炮塔

效果 炮塔对触发该效果的生物进行一次远程打击；随后该陷阱掷先攻。

Trigger A creature moves within 30 feet of the turret or attacks the turret

Effect The turret makes a ranged Strike against the triggering creature; the trap then rolls initiative.

Oversized Machine Gun.name: 超大型机枪 Oversized Machine Gun

Auto-Fire.name: 自动射击 Auto-Fire
Auto-Fire.description:
超大型机枪（@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic|traits:analog] 豁免）（非电子，@Template[type:cone|distance:45]），伤害 @Damage[(2d8+7)[piercing]|options:area-damage]

你尝试在不进行攻击检定的情况下命中锥形范围内的每个生物，其射程等于该武器射程增量的一半。区域内的任何生物都会受到武器伤害（基础 DC 25 反射豁免）。此伤害为区域伤害。在此次豁免中严重失败的生物，会受到使用此武器造成重击时触发的效果影响，包括该武器的重击专精效果。自动射击的消耗值等于区域内目标数量 × 2。

Oversized machine gun (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic|traits:analog] save) (analog, @Template[type:cone|distance:45]), Damage @Damage[(2d8+7)[piercing]|options:area-damage]

You attempt to hit each creature in a cone with a range equal to half the weapon's range increment without making an attack roll. Any creature in the area takes weapon damage (Basic DC 25 reflex save). This damage is area damage. Creatures that critically fail this save are subject to effects that occur on a critical hit with this weapon, including the weapon's critical specialization effect. Auto-Fire has an expend equal to the number of targets in the area × 2.

Sentry Turret.disable:
@Check[computers|dc:20]（受训）以重新编程炮塔，或 @Check[crafting|dc:19]（受训）以切断炮塔电源，或 @Check[thievery|dc:18]（受训）以禁用炮塔

@Check[computers|dc:20] (trained) to reprogram the turret, or @Check[crafting|dc:19] (trained) to cut power to the turret, or @Check[thievery|dc:18] (trained) to disable the turret
Sentry Turret.hazarddescription:
一座机械炮塔会攻击入侵者。

A mechanized turret attacks intruders.
Sentry Turret.reset:
该陷阱会在 1 分钟后重置。

The trap resets after 1 minute.
Sentry Turret.routine:
（3动作）该陷阱对射程内一个生物进行三次超大型机枪打击，或者该陷阱先进行一次自动射击攻击，再对射程内一个生物进行一次打击。

(3 actions) The trap makes three oversized machine gun Strikes against a creature in range, or the trap makes an Auto-Fire attack followed by one Strike against a creature in range.

Exploding Egg Sac.name: 爆炸卵囊 Exploding Egg Sac
Exploding Egg Sac.tokenName: 爆炸卵囊 Exploding Egg Sac

Explode.name: 爆炸 Explode
Explode.description:
触发条件 一个生物接触卵囊或接触一条丝线

效果 该陷阱对卵囊30英尺内的所有生物进行一次丝线打击，然后卵囊爆炸，对30英尺内的所有生物造成 @Damage[(2d10+9)[acid]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:29|basic] 豁免）。如果卵囊内的生物可存活，它就会孵化。

Trigger A creature touches the egg sac or touches a filament

Effect The trap makes a filament Strike against all creatures within 30 feet of the egg sac, then the egg sac explodes, dealing @Damage[(2d10+9)[acid]] damage to all creatures within 30 feet (@Check[reflex|dc:29|basic] save). If the creature within the egg sac is viable, it hatches.

Filament.name: 细丝 Filament
Filament.description:
没有多重攻击减值

No multiple attack penalty

Exploding Egg Sac.disable:
@Check[nature|dc:30]（受训）使卵囊内爆，或 @Check[survival|dc:23]（专家）安全地摧毁相邻方格中的丝状物

@Check[nature|dc:30] (trained) to cause the egg sac to implode, or @Check[survival|dc:23] (expert) to safely destroy the filaments in an adjacent square
Exploding Egg Sac.hazarddescription:
一个椭圆形的异星卵囊从地面或其他表面中冒出；在卵囊周围30英尺半径内的所有表面上，都覆盖着如血管般搏动的丝状物。

An ovular alien egg sac emerges from the ground or other surface; pulsing, veinlike filaments cover all surfaces in a 30-foot radius around the egg sac.
Exploding Egg Sac.reset:
如果卵囊存活且尚未孵化，丝状物会在 1 天内重新长出。

If the egg sac survives and hasn't hatched, filaments regrow in 1 day.

Disintegration Chamber.name: 解离室 Disintegration Chamber

Nanite Release.name: 纳米机器人释放 Nanite Release
Nanite Release.description:
触发条件 一个生物进入该房间，或在该房间内结束其回合

效果 该陷阱对触发该陷阱的生物进行一次纳米机械打击，然后掷先攻。

Trigger A creature enters the room or ends its turn in the room

Effect The trap makes a nanite Strike against the triggering creature, then rolls initiative.

Nanite.name: 纳米机器人 Nanite
Nanite.description:
没有多重攻击减值

No multiple attack penalty

Nanite Swarm.name: 纳米虫群 Nanite Swarm
Nanite Swarm.description:
触发条件 房间内的一名生物结束其回合

效果 该陷阱对触发该条件的生物进行一次纳米机器人打击。

Trigger A creature within the room ends its turn

Effect The trap makes a nanite Strike against the triggering creature.

Disintegration Chamber.disable:
在控制面板上进行 @Check[crafting|dc:22]（受训）或盗窃（受训）以停用陷阱，或进行 @Check[computers|dc:24]（受训）以重新编程控制面板

@Check[crafting|dc:22] (trained) or Thievery (trained) on the control panel to deactivate the trap, or @Check[computers|dc:24] (trained) to reprogram the control panel
Disintegration Chamber.hazarddescription:
当传感器检测到陷阱房间内有动静时，房门会封死，四个墙壁上的孔口随之开启，向房间内释放分解纳米机器人。

When sensors detect movement in the trapped room, the doors seal shut, and four wall apertures open, releasing disintegrating nanites into the room.
Disintegration Chamber.reset:
该陷阱会在1分钟后停用并重置。

The trap deactivates and resets after 1 minute.
Disintegration Chamber.routine:
（1 动作）陷阱以 1 个动作向房间内的每个生物发射纳米机器人。由于它会持续发射纳米机器人，该陷阱还可以使用“纳米机器人虫群”自由动作（见下文），在每个生物的回合中向该生物发射纳米机器人。

(1 action) The trap launches nanites against every creature in the room as 1 action. Because it launches nanites continuously, the trap can also use the Nanite Swarm free action (see below) to launch nanites at each creature during that creature's turn.
Disintegration Chamber.stealthdetails:
（专家）或 DC 31（专家）才能注意到控制面板

(expert) or DC 31 (expert) to notice the control panel

Traumatic Moment.name: 创伤时刻 Traumatic Moment

Jump Scare.name: 惊吓突袭 Jump Scare
Jump Scare.description:
触发条件 一个生物移动到闹鬼区域 10 尺范围内

效果 闹鬼现象重演了造就它的创伤时刻，如同该生物正在亲身经历该事件一般，鲜明地冲击其感官。该生物必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:24] 豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到 @Damage[(2d8+5)[mental]] 伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 目标受到 @Damage[(4d8+10)[mental]] 伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大失败 目标受到 @Damage[(8d8+20)[mental]] 伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}。

Trigger A creature moves within 10 feet of the haunted area

Effect The haunt replays the traumatic moment that created it, vividly assaulting the creature's senses as though the creature was experiencing the event. The creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:24] save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes @Damage[(2d8+5)[mental]] damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target takes @Damage[(4d8+10)[mental]] damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target takes @Damage[(8d8+20)[mental]] damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Traumatic Moment.disable:
@Check[occultism|dc:28]（专家）或宗教（专家）以净化该区域

@Check[occultism|dc:28] (expert) or Religion (expert) to cleanse the area
Traumatic Moment.hazarddescription:
一场可怖事件的灵能残印以生动鲜明的细节重现。

A psychic imprint of a horrific event replays in vivid detail.

Torpedo Minisub.name: 鱼雷迷你潜航器 Torpedo Minisub
Torpedo Minisub.tokenName: 鱼雷迷你潜艇 Torpedo Minisub

Submersible.name: 潜水式 Submersible
Submersible.description:
鱼雷微型潜艇可以在水面下航行，携带一个储气舱，足以维持 2 个中型生物长达 24 小时的呼吸需求。鱼雷微型潜艇可以安全下潜至最深 1 英里的深度。若损坏，鱼雷微型潜艇会从其储气舱中漏气，使储存空气每轮减少 10 分钟。损坏的鱼雷微型潜艇其最大下潜深度减半（若有必要，在损坏时会上浮至该深度）。

The torpedo minisub can travel beneath the surface of the water, carrying an air reservoir suitable to sustain 2 Medium creatures for up to 24 hours. The torpedo minisub can safely reach depths of up to 1 mile. If broken, the torpedo minisub loses air from its reservoir, reducing the stored air by 10 minutes per round. A broken torpedo minisub has its maximum depth reduced by half (and rises to that depth when broken, if necessary).

Quantum Clone.name: 量子克隆 Quantum Clone

Materialize.name: 具现 Materialize
Materialize.description:
触发条件 一个生物接触到量子粒子

效果 量子粒子会实体化出触发该效果的生物的一个完美复制体。该量子克隆在外观上与该生物完全一致，并会模仿该生物的动作与言语，直到它有时间观察并充分学习该生物的行为模式，从而能够完全独立行动；这一过程需要1分钟。量子克隆实体化时不带任何武器或装备，但如果该生物具有徒手打击，则它可以使用这些打击。量子克隆掷先攻。

Trigger A creature touches the quantum particles

Effect The quantum particles materialize a perfect copy of the triggering creature. The quantum clone is visually identical to the creature and mimics the creature's actions and speech until it has time to observe and learn the creature's patterns well enough to act entirely on its own, a process that takes 1 minute. The quantum clone materializes with no weapons or equipment but can use unarmed Strikes if the creature has them. The quantum clone rolls initiative.

Mimic.name: 拟态怪 Mimic
Mimic.description:
1 到 3 量子克隆会模仿它观察到触发生物所进行的一个动作，包括职业能力、移动、法术和言语。它在自己的先攻时发动攻击，使用与原始生物相同的数据。

1 to 3 The quantum clone mimics an action it's observed the triggering creature take, including class abilities, movements, spells, and speech. It attacks on its initiative, using the same statistics as the original creature.

Quantum Clone.disable:
@Check[intimidation|dc:42]（大师）以恐吓克隆体使其退走，或 @Check[diplomacy|dc:42]（大师）以与克隆体达成协议，或 @Check[arcana|dc:45]（大师）或自然（大师）以驱散量子粒子；总共需要三次成功才能停用该陷阱

@Check[intimidation|dc:42] (master) to frighten the clone away, or @Check[diplomacy|dc:42] (master) to reach an accord with the clone, or @Check[arcana|dc:45] (master) or Nature (master) to disperse the quantum particles; three total successes are required to disable the trap
Quantum Clone.hazarddescription:
量子粒子构成了一个生物的精确复制体，能够以诡异得完美无瑕的方式模仿其动作、言语和思想。

Quantum particles form an exact copy of a creature that can mimic its actions, speech, and thoughts with eerie perfection.
Quantum Clone.routine:
(3 actions) 量子复制体观察触发生物，并模仿该生物的行为；一旦它受到伤害，便会立即采取敌对行动。在前 2 个回合中，量子复制体会完全按照触发生物行动时的确切顺序来采取行动；但在之后的回合中，它会进行战术性行动，以任意顺序使用它观察到该生物曾使用过的动作和反应。

(3 actions) The quantum clone observes the triggering creature and mimics the creature's behavior, taking hostile actions as soon as it takes damage. For the first 2 rounds, the quantum clone takes actions in the exact order the triggering creature did, but in the following rounds, it acts tactically, using actions and reactions it observed the creature using in any order.

Haywire Autopilot.name: 故障自动驾驶仪 Haywire Autopilot
Haywire Autopilot.tokenName: 失灵自动驾驶系统 Haywire Autopilot

Ram.name: 随机存取存储器 Ram
Ram.description:
一个生物移动到悬浮车 30 英尺内

效果 悬浮车沿直线行驶 30 英尺，对其穿过区域内的所有生物造成 @Damage[(2d10+13)[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:32|basic] 豁免）。被车辆伤害到的生物还会被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。随后，该陷阱掷先攻。

A creature moves within 30 feet of the hovercar

Effect The hovercar drives 30 feet in a straight line, dealing @Damage[(2d10+13)[bludgeoning]] damage to all creatures in the area it passes through (@Check[reflex|dc:32|basic] save). Creatures damaged by the car are additionally knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. The trap then rolls initiative.

Haywire Autopilot.disable:
@Check[computers|dc:26]（专家）以远程重编程自动驾驶仪，或在车上时进行 @Check[piloting|dc:24] 或 @Check[thievery|dc:24]（专家）以强制覆盖自动驾驶仪；总共需要三次成功才能禁用陷阱；进行 @Check[acrobatics|dc:23] 或 @Check[athletics|dc:23] 以登上车辆（登车不会禁用陷阱）

@Check[computers|dc:26] (expert) to remotely reprogram the autopilot, or @Check[piloting|dc:24] or @Check[thievery|dc:24] (expert) to override the autopilot while aboard the car; three total successes are required to disable the trap; @Check[acrobatics|dc:23] or @Check[athletics|dc:23] to board the car (boarding doesn't disable the trap)
Haywire Autopilot.hazarddescription:
一辆悬浮车的自动驾驶系统发生故障，导致它碾过附近的生物。

A hovercar's autopilot goes haywire, causing it to run over nearby creatures.
Haywire Autopilot.routine:
（3 个动作）该陷阱每次成功停用后，每轮失去 1 个动作。悬浮车花费 1 个动作沿直线行驶 30 英尺，如此三次，并可在动作之间按需改变方向。位于悬浮车经过区域内的生物受到 @Damage[(2d10+13)[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:32|basic] 豁免）。被车辆伤害的生物还会被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{伏地}。

(3 actions) The trap loses 1 action each turn for each successful disable. The hovercar uses 1 action to drive 30 feet in a straight line, three times, changing direction between actions as desired. Creatures in the area the hovercar passes through take @Damage[(2d10+13)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:32|basic] save). Creatures damaged by the car are additionally knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Controlled Plummet.name: 可控俯冲 Controlled Plummet
Controlled Plummet.description:
这辆载具被编程为从另一辆空中载具或宇宙飞船中部署，并以第一轮500英尺、此后每轮1,500英尺的速度朝地面坠落，适用于正常重力的世界。在撞击前一轮，反重力旋翼、降落伞和反推火箭会将下降速度减缓至每轮60英尺，从而实现安全着陆（即使处于失控状态）。

This vehicle is programmed to deploy from another airborne vehicle or spaceship and fall toward the ground at a rate of 500 feet the first round and 1,500 feet each round thereafter, for a world with normal gravity. One round before impact, antigrav rotors, parachutes, and retrorockets slow the descent to 60 feet per round, allowing for a safe landing (even if uncontrolled).

Enclosed.name: 包围的 Enclosed
Enclosed.description:
空投舱的驾驶员和乘客被完全封闭在内，且与载具外的任何生物或物体之间都没有视线或效果线。

The pilot and passengers of a drop pod are completely enclosed and don't have line of sight or line of effect with any creatures or objects outside the vehicle.

Space Vehicle.name: 太空载具 Space Vehicle
Space Vehicle.description:
这辆载具可保护其使用者免受太空危险侵害，其中包括 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.FLODmOj4yK7eJn0a]{基础环境防护} 的益处，以及一个 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.0kD0MZgiK0SYS6e6]{商用过滤式再呼吸器}。

This vehicle protects its users from the dangers of space, including the benefits of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.FLODmOj4yK7eJn0a]{Basic Environmental Protection} and a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.0kD0MZgiK0SYS6e6]{Commercial Filtered Rebreather}.

Anti-Gravity Pulse.name: 反重力脉冲 Anti-Gravity Pulse

Gravity Pulse.name: 重力脉冲 Gravity Pulse
Gravity Pulse.description:
触发条件 一个生物进入传感器的探测区域

效果 陷阱释放出一道重力脉冲，对触发该陷阱的生物造成 @Damage[(2d6+3)[force]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:15|basic] 豁免）。随后，传感器周围30英尺内的区域变为失重状态，持续1分钟。

Trigger A creature enters the sensor's detection area

Effect The trap releases a gravity pulse, dealing @Damage[(2d6+3)[force]] damage to the triggering creature (@Check[reflex|dc:15|basic] save). The area within 30 feet of the sensor then becomes zero gravity for 1 minute.

Anti-Gravity Pulse.disable:
@Check[computers|dc:18]（受训）以干扰运动探测器的信号，或 @Check[thievery|dc:16]（受训）以停用运动探测器

@Check[computers|dc:18] (trained) to jam the motion detector's signal or @Check[thievery|dc:16] (trained) to deactivate the motion detector
Anti-Gravity Pulse.hazarddescription:
一个有害的反重力脉冲会由一个能探测到30英尺内移动的传感器触发。

A harmful pulse of anti-gravity is activated by a sensor that detects motion within 30 feet.
Anti-Gravity Pulse.reset:
这个陷阱会在15分钟后重置。

The trap resets after 15 minutes.

Distracting Holo Ad.name: 分散注意力的全息广告 Distracting Holo Ad
Distracting Holo Ad.tokenName: 分心全息广告 Distracting Holo Ad

Buy! Buy! Buy!.name: 买！买！买！ Buy! Buy! Buy!
Buy! Buy! Buy!.description:
触发条件 区域内有一名生物完成一个动作

效果 该陷阱会投放一则定向广告，诱使观看者花费信用点购买某种商品或服务。30英尺内所有能够看见、听见或感知到该广告的生物都必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:17] 豁免。该陷阱掷先攻。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。

失败 目标目眩，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}。

大失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}，持续1轮，且除非按照广告的指示接入最近的计算机或通讯装置并进行购买，否则不能采取任何动作。

Trigger A creature in the area finishes an action

Effect The trap launches a targeted ad enticing viewers to spend credits on a product or service. All creatures within 30 feet who can see, hear, or sense the ad must attempt a @Check[will|dc:17] save. The trap rolls initiative.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}.

Failure The target is dazzled and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} for 1 round and can't take any actions except to access the nearest computer or comm unit and make purchases as directed by the ad.

Distracting Holo Ad.disable:
@Check[computers|dc:17]（受训）以关闭该广告，或 @Check[crafting|dc:20]（受训）或盗窃（受训）以停用投影仪

@Check[computers|dc:17] (trained) to deactivate the ad, or @Check[crafting|dc:20] (trained) or Thievery (trained) to disable the projector
Distracting Holo Ad.hazarddescription:
色彩鲜艳、栩栩如生的人影在一则全息影像广告中穿梭闪现，伴随着一连串令人愉悦的声音与感官体验，诱使路人花费他们的信用点。这道全息影像的来源是附近的一台投影仪。

Colorful, lifelike figures flit in and out of a holographic advertisement in a barrage of pleasant sounds and sensations, enticing passersby to spend their credits. The hologram's source is a nearby projector.
Distracting Holo Ad.reset:
该陷阱会停用，并在 1 分钟后重置。

The trap deactivates and resets after 1 minute.
Distracting Holo Ad.routine:
（1 动作）该危害每轮都会播放一则新的广告，迫使所有能够感知到它的生物进行一次新的豁免。

(1 action) The hazard plays a new ad each round, forcing all creatures that can sense it to attempt a new save.
Distracting Holo Ad.stealthdetails:
（受训）或 DC 20（专家）以注意到全息投影仪，或侦测魔法

(trained), or DC 20 (expert) to notice the holoprojector, or detect magic

Drifter.name: 漂泊者 Drifter
Drifter.description:
巡逻飞艇只能使用其机动推进装置来操纵，否则便依赖有利的风向将其带往正确的方向。如果驾驶员未能使用其风力推进维持对飞艇的控制，飞艇就会随风漂移，由风把它带向任何方向，每轮最多移动其速度的四倍，具体由GM决定。

The patrol dirigible can only be steered using its motorized propulsion, otherwise relying on favorable wind currents to carry it in the right direction. If the pilot fails to maintain control of the dirigible using its wind propulsion, the dirigible drifts whichever way the wind carries it, moving up to four times its Speed each round as determined by the GM.

Hangar Bay.name: 机库舱室 Hangar Bay
Hangar Bay.description:
巡逻飞艇可提供一个位置，用于停靠最多两辆巨型或更小的载具。

The patrol dirigible provides a place for up to two Huge or smaller vehicles to be docked.

Devastating Collision.name: 毁灭性碰撞 Devastating Collision

Crash.name: 坠毁 Crash
Crash.description:
触发条件 一个生物穿过街道

效果 一辆幽灵悬浮卡车撞向所有正在穿过街道的生物，造成 @Damage[(6d12+37)[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:43] 豁免）。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，并被向后推10英尺。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，被击倒为俯卧状态，并被向后推20英尺。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，被击倒为俯卧状态，并被向后推30英尺。

Trigger A creature crosses the street

Effect A phantom hover truck crashes into all creatures crossing the street, dealing @Damage[(6d12+37)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:43] save).

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage, is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, and is pushed 10 feet back.

Failure The creature takes full damage, is knocked prone, and is pushed 20 feet back.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is knocked prone, and is pushed 30 feet back.

Devastating Collision.disable:
@Check[occultism|dc:38] (大师) 以驱散幻影卡车，或 @Check[religion|dc:36] (大师) 以防护自己免受伤害

@Check[occultism|dc:38] (master) to disperse the phantom truck, or @Check[religion|dc:36] (master) to ward yourself from harm
Devastating Collision.hazarddescription:
一辆幻影悬浮卡车撞上生物，以血腥的细节重现了过去的一场事故。

A phantom hover truck collides with creatures, replaying an accident from the past in gory detail.
Devastating Collision.stealthdetails:
（大师）听见悬浮喷射器的轰鸣声

(master) to hear the roar of hover jets

Caustic Nectar Spray.name: 腐蚀蜜浆喷射 Caustic Nectar Spray
Caustic Nectar Spray.tokenName: 腐蚀花蜜喷射 Caustic Nectar Spray

Nectar Spray.name: 花蜜喷射 Nectar Spray
Nectar Spray.description:
触发条件 一个生物进入花朵 15 英尺内

效果 花朵对触发该反应的生物进行一次花蜜打击。

Trigger A creature comes within 15 feet of the flower

Effect The flower makes a nectar Strike against the triggering creature.

Caustic Nectar Spray.disable:
@Check[nature|dc:13]（受训）可使这朵花进入被动态，或 @Check[survival|dc:13]（受训）可误导这朵花的感官；@Check[acrobatics|dc:16] 可在不触发这朵花的情况下从其旁边移动（这不会停用该陷阱）

@Check[nature|dc:13] (trained) to lull the flower into a passive state, or @Check[survival|dc:13] (trained) to mislead the flower's senses; @Check[acrobatics|dc:16] to move by the flower without triggering it (this doesn't disable the trap)
Caustic Nectar Spray.hazarddescription:
一朵异星花朵喷出一股腐蚀性的花蜜。

An alien flower sprays a stream of caustic nectar.
Caustic Nectar Spray.reset:
这朵花的花蜜储备会在 1 小时后补满。

The flower's nectar reserve is refilled after 1 hour.

Tranquilizer Darts Trap.name: 镇静飞镖陷阱 Tranquilizer Darts Trap
Tranquilizer Darts Trap.tokenName: 麻醉飞镖陷阱 Tranquilizer Darts Trap

Dart Volley.name: 飞镖齐射 Dart Volley
Dart Volley.description:
触发 一个生物踩到压力板

效果 陷阱以镇静飞镖对大厅内至多三个生物进行一次Strike。远程镇静飞镖 +14，伤害 1d6 穿刺和 1d6 毒素，外加镇静剂；无多重攻击减值 镇静剂（失能，毒素）

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

最大持续时间 4轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}（1轮）

阶段 2 笨拙 1 且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}（1轮）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2} 且睡着 1分钟（1分钟）

Trigger A creature steps on a pressure plate

Effect The trap makes a tranquilizer dart Strike against up to three creatures in the hall. Ranged tranquilizer dart +14, Damage 1d6 piercing and 1d6 poison plus tranquilizer; no multiple attack penalty Tranquilizer (incapacitation, poison)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

Maximum Duration 4 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 clumsy 1 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and asleep for 1 minute (1 minute)

Tranquilizer Darts Trap.disable:
@Check[crafting|dc:18]（受训）或盗窃（受训）以停用压力板

@Check[crafting|dc:18] (trained) or Thievery (trained) to disable the pressure plates
Tranquilizer Darts Trap.hazarddescription:
地板上对重量敏感的压力板会触发走廊尽头的孔洞，向走廊中的生物发射麻醉飞镖。

Weight-sensitive pressure plates in the floor trigger a hole at the hallway's end to fire tranquilizer darts at creatures in the hall.

Venting Airlock.name: 排气气闸舱 Venting Airlock

Vent.name: 通风口 Vent
Vent.description:
触发条件 一个或多个生物进入气闸舱室

效果 外侧气闸门开启，将可呼吸空气排放到外面的真空或有害大气中。该生物开始窒息，并且必须进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:20] 豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标被吸出气闸 10 英尺，并受到 @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

大失败 目标被吸出气闸 10 英尺，并受到 @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

Trigger One or more creatures enters the airlock compartment

Effect The outer airlock door opens, venting breathable air out into the vacuum or harmful atmosphere beyond. The creature begins suffocating and must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:20] save.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is sucked 10 feet out of the airlock and takes @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] damage.

Critical Failure The target is sucked 10 feet out of the airlock and takes @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] damage.

Venting Airlock.disable:
@Check[crafting|dc:17]（受训）以修理气闸，或 @Check[thievery|dc:17]（受训）以将气闸卡死关闭

@Check[crafting|dc:17] (trained) to repair the airlock, or @Check[thievery|dc:17] (trained) to jam the airlock closed
Venting Airlock.hazarddescription:
一个发生故障的气闸在生物位于其中时意外开启。

A malfunctioning airlock opens unexpectedly while creatures are inside.

Vision of Manifold Realities.name: 多重现实幻景 Vision of Manifold Realities
Vision of Manifold Realities.tokenName: 万象现实之景象 Vision of Manifold Realities

Glimpse Manifold Realities.name: 瞥见多重现实 Glimpse Manifold Realities
Glimpse Manifold Realities.description:
触发条件 一个有智能的生物进入该区域

效果 陷阱对所有能够感知这些幻象的有智能生物造成 @Damage[(4d8+18)[mental]] 伤害（@Check[will|dc:26|basic] 豁免）。严重失败的生物还会在幻象中迷失自我，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 状态，持续 [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 轮}。

Trigger An intelligent creature enters the area

Effect The trap deals @Damage[(4d8+18)[mental]] damage to all intelligent creatures who can perceive the visions (@Check[will|dc:26|basic] save). Creatures who critically fail additionally lose themself in the visions, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Vision of Manifold Realities.disable:
@Check[arcana|dc:26]（专家）以驱散这些幻象，或 @Check[occultism|dc:28]（专家）以用意志压制这些幻象，或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}（4环；反制 DC 24）以反制这些幻象

@Check[arcana|dc:26] (expert) to banish the visions, or @Check[occultism|dc:28] (expert) to exert your will over the visions, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (4th rank; counteract DC 24) to counteract the visions
Vision of Manifold Realities.hazarddescription:
在房间中飞掠的缕缕扭曲现实的魔法会被有智能的生物吸引，令他们脑海中充满无数平行现实的幻象。

Wisps of reality-warping magic that flit through the room are drawn to intelligent creatures, filling their minds with visions of countless alternate realities.

Reactor Meltdown.name: 反应堆熔毁 Reactor Meltdown

Radiation Leak.name: 辐射泄漏 Radiation Leak
Radiation Leak.description:
触发条件 一个生物查看了反应堆的传感器或控制台

效果 距离反应堆60英尺内的生物会暴露于强烈辐射之下（@Check[fortitude|dc:32]；第91页）。该陷阱掷先攻。

Trigger A creature views the reactor's sensors or console

Effect Creatures within 60 feet of the reactor are exposed to incredible radiation (@Check[fortitude|dc:32]; page 91). The trap rolls initiative.

Nuclear Explosion.name: 核爆炸 Nuclear Explosion
Nuclear Explosion.description:
触发条件 陷阱以100英尺半径完成其例行程序

效果 反应堆爆炸，在500英尺半径内造成 @Damage[(4d10+20)[fire]] 伤害，并无视爆炸区域内任何物品的硬度（@Check[fortitude|dc:46|basic] 豁免）。区域内的一切都会暴露于惊人的辐射之中。核爆炸区域会变为受辐照区域，并在50年内持续泄漏重度辐射。

Trigger The trap completed its routine with a radius of 100 feet

Effect The reactor explodes, dealing @Damage[(4d10+20)[fire]] damage in a 500 foot radius, bypassing the hardness of any items in the blast zone (@Check[fortitude|dc:46|basic] save). Everything in the area is exposed to incredible radiation. The area of the nuclear explosion becomes irradiated, leaking severe radiation for 50 years.

Reactor Meltdown.disable:
@Check[computers|dc:45]（大师）或制作（大师）以启动停机程序，或 @Check[thievery|dc:47]（大师）以排放反应堆；总共需要三次成功才能禁用该陷阱

@Check[computers|dc:45] (master) or Crafting (master) to initiate shutdown procedures, or @Check[thievery|dc:47] (master) to vent the reactor; three total successes are required to disable the trap
Reactor Meltdown.hazarddescription:
核反应堆过载，随后爆炸。

A nuclear reactor overloads, then explodes.
Reactor Meltdown.routine:
（1 个动作）当反应堆过热时，陷阱对 60 英尺内的生物造成 @Damage[(4d10+20)[fire]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:42|basic] 豁免）。区域内的所有生物都会暴露于惊人的辐射之下。每当陷阱使用此例行动作时，该区域增加 10 英尺。当该例行动作的半径达到 100 英尺时，结算该例行动作。然后，反应堆立即爆炸，使用 Nuclear Explosion。

(1 action) As the reactor overheats, the trap deals @Damage[(4d10+20)[fire]] damage to creatures within 60 feet (@Check[fortitude|dc:42|basic] save). All creatures in the area are exposed to incredible radiation. Each time the trap uses this routine, the area increases by 10 feet. When the routine's radius equals 100 feet, resolve the routine. Then, the reactor immediately explodes, using Nuclear Explosion.

Collapsing Building.name: 坍塌建筑 Collapsing Building
Collapsing Building.tokenName: 坍塌中的建筑 Collapsing Building

Shudder.name: 颤栗 Shudder
Shudder.description:
触发条件 某个效果对建筑造成伤害，或建筑周围的地面发生位移

效果 建筑震颤并发出吱嘎声，预示着即将坍塌。建筑内部变为困难地形。该陷阱掷先攻。

Trigger An effect damages the building, or the ground around the building shifts

Effect The building shudders and creaks, signaling an imminent collapse. The building's interior becomes difficult terrain. The trap rolls initiative.

Collapsing Building.disable:
@Check[arcana|dc:38]（专家）或自然（专家）以用魔法支撑建筑，@Check[crafting|dc:34]（大师）或求生（大师）以稳定建筑，@Check[religion|dc:38]（专家）以祈祷坍塌停止；总共需要四次成功才能阻止坍塌

@Check[arcana|dc:38] (expert) or Nature (expert) to magically prop up the building, @Check[crafting|dc:34] (master) or Survival (master) to stabilize the building, @Check[religion|dc:38] (expert) to pray for the collapse to cease; four total successes are required to stop the collapse
Collapsing Building.hazarddescription:
一栋建筑倒塌，对里面的所有人造成伤害。

A building collapses, harming everyone inside.
Collapsing Building.routine:
（1 动作）建筑开始坍塌。建筑内的所有生物受到 @Damage[(3d10+18)[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:39|basic] 豁免）。豁免严重失败的生物还会被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，并受到 @Damage[1d6[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。

(1 action) The building begins to collapse. All creatures in the building take @Damage[(3d10+18)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:39|basic] save). A creature that critically fails its save is additionally knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} and takes @Damage[1d6[persistent,bleed]] damage.

Free Action.name: 自由动作 Free Action
Free Action.description:
叉车用前方的货叉搬运货物，最多可运载 1,000 Bulk。

A forklift carries its cargo on its front forks and can carry up to 1,000 Bulk.

Lift.name: 抬起 Lift
Lift.description:
驾驶员将叉车的货叉升至离地最高15英尺，或将叉车的货叉降至地面。

The pilot raises the forklift's forks up to 15 feet in the air, or lowers the forklift's forks down to the ground.

Soul Upload.name: 灵魂上传 Soul Upload

Upload Soul.name: 上传灵魂 Upload Soul
Upload Soul.description:
触发 未获授权的生物直接或借助工具抓住该电脑

效果 该陷阱尝试将触发生物的灵魂上传进电脑。触发生物必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:40] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到 @Damage[(3d10+15)[spirit]] 伤害。

失败 该生物的灵魂暂时被从其身体中拖拽出来。它受到 @Damage[(6d10+30)[spirit]] 伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}。

大失败 该生物的灵魂被从其身体中拖拽出来，并上传到电脑上的一个数据模块中。其身体仍作为一个没有灵魂的躯壳存在，除非其灵魂被归还，否则会在 1 周内缓慢死去。摧毁该电脑会摧毁其灵魂。

Trigger An unauthorized creature grasps the computer directly or with a tool

Effect The trap attempts to upload the triggering creature's soul into the computer. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:40] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes @Damage[(3d10+15)[spirit]] damage.

Failure The creature's soul is temporarily pulled from their body. It takes @Damage[(6d10+30)[spirit]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}.

Critical Failure The creature's soul is pulled from its body and uploaded to a data module on the computer. Its body remains a soulless vessel, which slowly dies over the course of 1 week unless its soul is returned. Destroying the computer destroys its soul.

Soul Upload.disable:
@Check[arcana|dc:36]（专家）以抽取计算机的魔法能量，或 @Check[computers|dc:36]（专家）以伪造已授权凭证，或 @Check[thievery|dc:40]（专家）以停用该陷阱，或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}（7环；反制 DC 34）以反制该陷阱

@Check[arcana|dc:36] (expert) to drain the computer's magical energy, or @Check[computers|dc:36] (expert) to falsify authorized credentials, or @Check[thievery|dc:40] (expert) to disable the trap, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (7th rank; counteract DC 34) to counteract the trap
Soul Upload.hazarddescription:
一台计算机受到一个混合陷阱的保护，它会将所有未经授权用户的灵魂上传到计算机上的一个惰性数据模块中。

A computer is protected by a hybrid trap, which uploads the soul of all unauthorized users to an inert data module on the computer.

Portable.name: 便携 Portable
Portable.description:
能量摩托可以由一个中型生物沿地面用其车轮拖拽。该生物处于负重状态。

The enercycle can be pulled along the ground on its wheel by a Medium creature. The creature is encumbered.
